'''Long-necked gundarks''' were large, quadruped animals with long necks and long tongues which they would use to catch their prey. [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] encountered gundarks on [[Kharzet III]], a jungle planet, while they were scouting for a location for the new [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

Despite its name, the creature was not related to the true [[Gundark/Legends|gundark]]. A young [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] named [[Kin Kimdyara]] gave the species its nickname due to its vicious temperament, rather than its physiology. However, he died before he could properly name this creature, so the name "long-necked gundark" stuck.
